title: 4. **NFC Card SaaS Upsell**
summary:
What it is: Offer premium features or services for xyz.cards NFC card SaaS, such as custom card design, priority support, or advanced analytics.
Revenue model: Increase average revenue per user (ARPU) through upselling existing customers on these additional services.
Time to first dollar: 1-2 weeks.
First action: Analyze current customer usage patterns and feedback to identify potential premium features that would add significant value.
Risk/blocker: Resistance from existing customers to pay for
